author: Haroen Viaene
subject: v4.0.0-beta.2
body: # [4.0.0-beta.2](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.0.0-beta.1...v4.0.0-beta.2) (2017-04-18) ### Bug Fixes * **InstantSearch:** dont fire request/onsearchStateChange when unmounting (algolia/react-instantsearch#26) ([f38a49d](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/f38a49d)) * **MultiIndex:** derived helper were using main index specifics params (algolia/react-instantsearch#36) ([ed90932](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/ed90932)) * **MultiIndex:** revert breaking change if no multiple index (algolia/react-instantsearch#32) ([037e221](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/037e221)) * **util:** remove empty key was removing non object key (algolia/react-instantsearch#29) ([7cadefe](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/7cadefe)) ### Features * **Highlighter:** allow rendering to custom tag (algolia/react-instantsearch#11) ([7d9a9d7](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/7d9a9d7)) * **SearchBox:** add default width and height to buttons. (algolia/react-instantsearch#34) ([2deb8b9](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/2deb8b9))
